Bus Timings

118 Bus Timings Al Ain to Sharjah

August 29, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Need to get from Al Ain’s green oasis to Sharjah’s bustling shores? The 118 Bus has got you covered. This reliable ride connects the UAE’s Garden City with Sharjah’s coastal charm, offering a glimpse of the country’s diverse landscapes along the way. It’s a convenient and budget-friendly option for both daily commuters and curious travelers. Interested in schedules, routes, and why it’s a smart choice? Let’s dive in and explore what makes the 118 Bus journey special. Contents

118 Al Ain to Sharjah Bus Timings

Knowing the bus departure from Al Ain Central bus is very important, and here, we will give you the timetable of 118 bus. It starts from 3:45 AM to 6:00 AM: Every 45 minute and from 6:00 AM to 11:00 PM: Every 60 minutes. And here is the timetable of Al Ain to Sharjah bus timings.

From Al Ain From Al Jubail (Sharjah)
06:00 03:45
07:00 04:30
08:00 05:15
09:00 06:00
10:00 07:00
11:00 08:00
12:00 09:00
13:00 10:00
14:00 11:00
15:00 12:00
16:00 13:00
17:00 14:00
18:00 15:00
19:00 16:00
20:00 17:00
21:00 18:00
22:00 19:00
23:00 20:00
23:45 21:00
00:30 22:00

About Bus 118 Route

The 118 Bus service from Al Ain to Sharjah serves as a vital link connecting two bustling cities in the United Arab Emirates

The journey aboard the 118 Bus is orchestrated with precision, ensuring timely departures and arrivals. With a comprehensive timetable, passengers can plan their travels effectively, knowing that the bus operates with consistency and reliability.

Embarking from the Al Ain Central Bus Station, the 118 Bus embarks on a scenic journey, making strategic stops along the route.1. Al Ain Central Bus Station

  1. King Faisal Street

  2. Ittihad Safeer Mall Shop

  3. Ittihad Park

  4. Al Wahda Street

  5. Al Jubail Bus Station

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

Other bus routes in Sharjah that you can check out include the 309 bus route, which runs from Al Quoz to Sharjah, and the 313 bus route, which goes from Al Rolla Terminal to Dubai Airport Terminal 2.## Price

One of the most appealing aspects of the 118 Bus service is its affordability. Despite offering a comfortable and convenient mode of transportation, the fare remains accessible to all.Read Also: Khor Fakkan to Sharjah Bus Timings With a one-way ticket priced at just 33 AED, passengers can traverse the distance between Al Ain and Sharjah without breaking the bank.

This affordability ensures that the 118 Bus remains an inclusive option for commuters from all walks of life, fostering a sense of accessibility and equality in transportation.

The Advantages

Many of the advantages that we will get when we choose bus as the transportation when we travel from Al Ain to Sharjah, several of them are:

Cost-Effective Travel

In an era where transportation costs can be prohibitive, the 118 Bus stands out as an economical option. With its affordable ticket prices, passengers can enjoy the convenience of intercity travel without straining their budgets.

Convenience and Comfort

The 118 Bus prioritizes passenger comfort, offering a smooth and comfortable ride throughout the journey. Equipped with modern amenities and spacious seating, the bus ensures a pleasant travel experience for all passengers.

Efficiency and Reliability

Whether commuting to work or embarking on a leisurely excursion, reliability is paramount. The 118 Bus upholds stringent standards of punctuality, ensuring that passengers reach their destinations on time, every time.

Cultural Exploration

Beyond its practical utility, the journey aboard the 118 Bus offers a unique opportunity for cultural exploration. As passengers traverse the diverse landscapes of the UAE, they are treated to a tapestry of sights and sounds, immersing themselves in the rich tapestry of Emirati culture.## Journey Experience

The 118 bus journey from Al Ain to Sharjah offers a long but scenic ride through the UAEï¿½s desert landscapes. Along the way, the bus skirts the Sharjah Desert Park, a popular destination featuring a zoo and botanical garden, perfect for nature enthusiasts and families.

As the bus approaches Sharjah, passengers are treated to views of the cityï¿½s cultural landmarks, such as the Sharjah Museum of Islamic Civilization and the iconic Blue Souk, renowned for its local handicrafts. Despite the lengthy duration, the journey is filled with opportunities to appreciate both the natural beauty and cultural richness of the UAE.## Conclusion

In conclusion, the 118 Bus embodies the spirit of connectivity, seamlessly bridging the gap between Al Ain and Sharjah. With its comprehensive timetable, affordable ticketing, and myriad advantages, the bus service emerges as a cornerstone of intercity travel in the UAE.

Whether embarking on a daily commute or embarking on a weekend getaway, passengers can trust the 118 Bus to deliver them safely and comfortably to their destination.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: August 29, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
